assessment_objectives.objective: statutory, regulatory and/or contractual obligations requiring a conformity assessment by an independent Third-Party Assessment Organization (3PAO) are identified.

a current and passing conformity assessment by an independent Third-Party Assessment Organization (3PAO) exists for each applicable statutory, regulatory and/or contractual obligation requiring a 3PAO's attestation.
processes, methods, and techniques to monitor security requirement compliance by external service providers on an ongoing basis are implemented.
